ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Math Games: Play games and work puzzles that allow students to practice thinking mathematically.
[ ] Math Games: Grades 7-8: Play games and work puzzles that allow you to think mathematically and spatially.
[ ] Math Games: Grades 7-8: Make up your own problems like the ones you studied this term.
